--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local end return(function(k,C,Q,N,D,I,d,b,B,n,v,J,E,y,Y,T,h,K,a,q,L)v,L,y,E,T,n,b,h,K,B,q,J,Y,a=function(k,A)local C=q(A)local Q=function(Q,N,D,I)return E(k,{Q;N;D;I},A,C)end return Q end,function(k)local return C(d)end,function(k,A)local C=q(A)local Q=function(Q)return E(k,{Q},A,C)end return Q end,-388887+388887,function(k,A)local C=q(A)local Q=function(Q,N)return E(k,{Q;N},A,C)end return Q return(J(8997217-(-358295),{}))(C(d))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[A(-1024178+984580)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
